message:
Fix semantic rerank and suggest command bugs

1. semantic.ts: Normalize BM25 scores to [0,1] range before combining
   with cosine similarity. Previously, high BM25 scores (>1) could
   dominate the 40/60 weighted combination.

2. suggest.ts: Pass task to formatSuggestion() so JSON output gets
   task-specific tips (e.g., "Great for generating improvement ideas"
   when task mentions "brainstorm").

All 114 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
